discriminator.reasoning: This mini app presents a unique side-scrolling one-button game with a feature of flipping gravity, which is a clear and distinct genre not represented in the existing templates. It has a reusable game-loop with collision detection and a unique obstacle mechanism including spikes, barriers, and pillars, which can be re-skinned by future users.
